Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. The street in the source
is empty — populate it with the people and vehicles specified below. Remove all
modern businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, street-facing, fov 75
- commercial arterial road, 4-lane, asphalt
- sidewalks present, curbs present
- driveways: north driveway apron, south driveway apron; parking: open asphalt apron surrounding pump islands
- gas station canopy building at center lot over pump islands, 1 story, steel frame, corrugated metal fascia, flat roof, 30 feet from road setback
- service station office building at rear right corner, 1 story, concrete block, brick veneer, flat parapet roof, at parking apron setback
- open service bay building at rear left corner, 1 story, concrete block, gabled metal roof, at parking apron setback
- utilities: overhead power lines on wooden poles, transformer on northeast corner pole
- landscape: flat asphalt apron, painted concrete curbing, narrow grass strip at road edge
- immutable elements: canopy with four corner support posts, pump island with eight dispensers, north and south driveway aprons
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 2005
Post-9/11 era. A 2005 gas station — big multi-island canopy, card readers at every pump, LED price sign, and a convenience store doing most of the business.

PERIOD DETAILS
- convenience store always attached
- large multi-island canopies
- price sign showing gas around $2.30
- main sign: an independent station sign in the style of Chevron
- window signs: 'CIGARETTES $3.75 PACK', 'PHONE CARDS SOLD HERE'
- a free real-estate flyer box by the door
- ribbon magnets on the door of the service office
Typography: clean sans-serif, polished brand identities.
Sign text is only what appears in quotes — do not turn other words from this prompt into signage.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 4 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a clerk restocking the window display inside
- a driver self-serving at the pump
- a woman walking a small dog in a sweater
Clothing: men in trucker hats, cargo shorts; women in chunky highlights, low-rise jeans. Fashion palette: denim, pink, white. No posing or eye contact. All people on sidewalks, at storefronts, or beside parked vehicles — the driving lanes stay empty of pedestrians.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 4 period vehicles, all different:
- 2003-2009 Hummer H2 — massive military-styled SUV — black
- 2004-2012 Chevrolet Colorado — mid-size pickup — gray
- 1998-2004 Nissan Frontier — compact pickup — gold
- 2002-2009 Chevrolet TrailBlazer — mid-size SUV boxy — silver
Parked with gaps; no vehicle newer than 2005.
PLACEMENT: the first two parked on the LEFT side; the rest parked on the RIGHT side. No vehicle in the same spot as any other era.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, turn arrows
- utilities: overhead power lines standard, cable and fiber lines on poles appearing

TREES
- cottonwood tree at northeast corner of lot: young tree, thin trunk
- elm tree at sidewalk edge left of entrance: very young sapling
- cedar tree at back fence line: maturing tree
Tree sizes MUST follow this specification even where they differ from the source photo.

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — early digital camera or Kodak/Fuji consumer film look.
Color: neutral tones. Grain: low grain, early digital noise in shadows.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
